en: Sure, go ahead. Major League Baseball and its fans,
they're gonna be more than happy to throw you and Google Boy under the bus if you keep doing what you're doing here.
You don't put a team together with a computer, Billy.
No? No. Baseball isn't just numbers.
It's not science. If it was, then anybody could do what we're doing,
but they can't because they don't know what we know.
They don't have our experience, and they don't have our intuition.
Okay. Billy, you got a kid in there that's got a degree in economics from Yale.
ko: 빌리, 거기 안에 학위를 가진 아이가 있어.
